evidence: "I read the book before seeing the movie - much more detailed than the movie. I enjoyed both immensely."
"This is probably the best version of this ballet I have seen."
"It probably doesn't matter if you see the movie or read the book first. Just do it!"
"The content and overall quality of the movie seem ok."
"I have enjoyed the 24 mini-series, however as it is with most material in this format, the earlier seasons were better."
"It's nice to have the whole series in one place."
"The dancing and music are both superb."
"Quality of the DVD is good, and I am glad I added it to my collection."
"Samuel Ramey is at his best in this SF Opera production."
"The music was fine, but it was painful to watch the tawdry theatrics."
"I loved the vintage footage, which greatly enhanced the overall impact of this piece."
"This film stays true to Bruce Cook's 1976 biography of Trumbo, although the scope of the movie does not cover the earlier parts of his life in Western Colorado."
"Luminous Years was so well done, I wanted to be able to view it over and over to soak up and better understand the art, music, and culture of that era."

summary: The user has a strong preference for biographical and documentary content, particularly enjoying high-quality productions. They appreciate slower pacing and emotional depth in storytelling, while showing some sensitivity to production quality and a mixed loyalty to specific creators.
